import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
  end

  mut reversed: List<Int> = []
  let len = nums.len()
  mut j = len - 1
  while j >= 0
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    reversed = list.push(reversed, v)
    j = j - 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  let rl = reversed.len()
  while k < rl
    let v = match reversed.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
